mapper.select: SELECT P.PROGRAM_ID , P.PROGRAM_NM , P.PROGRAM_TYPE , P.VENUE_ID , P.DESCRIPTION , P.AGE_LIMIT , P.RUNNING_TIME , P.POSTER_IMG , DATE_FORMAT(P.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate , DATE_FORMAT(P.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate , P.USE_YN , P.REG_USER , DATE_FORMAT(P.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDt , V.VENUE_NM AS venueNm FROM PROGRAM P LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE P.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId}

SELECT P.PROGRAM_ID , P.PROGRAM_NM , P.PROGRAM_TYPE , P.VENUE_ID , P.USE_YN , DATE_FORMAT(P.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS START_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(P.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS END_DATE , V.VENUE_NM FROM PROGRAM P LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND P.PROGRAM_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND P.PROGRAM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY P.PROGRAM_ID ASC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROGRAM P LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND P.PROGRAM_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND P.PROGRAM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT PROGRAM_ID , PROGRAM_NM , VENUE_ID FROM PROGRAM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PROGRAM_NM ASC
